# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.twilio.com
  - api.sendgrid.com
  - api.github.com
  - login.microsoftonline.com
  - graph.microsoft.com
  - www.googleapis.com
  - oauth2.googleapis.com
  - api.openai.com
  - api.datadoghq.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - name: https
    number: 443
    protocol: TLS
  - name: http
    number: 80
    protocol: HTTP
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mydb-prod.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  - mydb-replica.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  - redis-prod.xxxxxx.cache.amazonaws.com
  - kafka-prod.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - name: postgres
    number: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  - name: mysql
    number: 3306
    protocol: TCP
  - name: mongodb
    number: 27017
    protocol: TCP
  - name: redis
    number: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  - name: mssql
    number: 1433
    protocol: TCP
  - name: kafka
    number: 9092
    protocol: TCP
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.twilio.com
  - api.sendgrid.com
  - api.github.com
  - login.microsoftonline.com
  - graph.microsoft.com
  - www.googleapis.com
  - oauth2.googleapis.com
  - api.openai.com
  - api.datadoghq.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.stripe.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.twilio.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.sendgrid.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.sendgrid.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.github.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - login.microsoftonline.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: login.microsoftonline.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - graph.microsoft.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: graph.microsoft.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - www.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: www.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - oauth2.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: oauth2.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.openai.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.openai.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.datadoghq.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.datadoghq.com
        port:
          number: 443
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 80
      uri:
        prefix: /
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
        port:
          number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mydb-prod.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  - mydb-replica.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  - redis-prod.xxxxxx.cache.amazonaws.com
  - kafka-prod.example.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mydb-prod.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 5432
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mydb-prod.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 3306
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mydb-prod.abcdefghijk.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 27017
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis-prod.xxxxxx.cache.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 6379
  - match:
    - port: 9092
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kafka-prod.example.com
        port:
          number: 9092
